title: Pharaoh
writer: Boleslaw Prus, Tadeusz Konwicki, Jerzy Kawalerowicz
actors: Jerzy Zelnik, Wieslawa Mazurkiewicz, Barbara Brylska
plot: Young Pharaoh Ramses XIII clashes with Egypt's clergy over influence on the affairs of the state and its coffers.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 2 nominations total
